```plantuml
@startuml

actor "havenarbeider" as havenarbeider
actor "douane en voedselinspectie" as douane
actor "scheepsagent" as scheepsagent
participant "Api gateway" as api
participant "kapiteinsdienst" as kapiteinsdienst
participant "administratie" as administratie
participant "containerbeheer en –transport" as containerbeheer

group per schip
    scheepsagent -> api : registerVessel
    api -> kapiteinsdienst : registerVessel
    kapiteinsdienst -> administratie : requestOffer
    administratie -> kapiteinsdienst : offerCreated
    kapiteinsdienst -> containerbeheer : newContainerList

    opt deleteOffer
        scheepsagent -> api : offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
        api -> kapiteinsdienst : offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
        kapiteinsdienst -> administratie : deleteOffer
    end

    scheepsagent -> api : getDocuments
    api -> containerbeheer : getDocuments
    containerbeheer --> scheepsagent : 
end

group per havenarbeider
    havenarbeider -> api : timeBadging
    api -> administratie : timeBadging
    administratie -> containerbeheer : 
    havenarbeider -> api : getPayCheck
    api -> administratie : getPayCheck
    administratie --> havenarbeider : 
end

@enduml
```
